name: withanolide A
mechanism: proposed mechanism based on preclinical data: neuroprotective and anti-neuroinflammatory activity with reported effects on hippocampal neuroinflammation and neurotrophic/oxidative-stress signaling. Human target-level confirmation is limited.
contraindications: No compound-specific clinical drug interactions established.
summary: proposed mechanism based on preclinical data: neuroprotective and anti-neuroinflammatory activity with reported effects on hippocampal neuroinflammation and neurotrophic/oxidative-stress signaling. Human target-level confirmation is limited.
